languages.text: {n}Взгляд Себериана задерживается на вас, но Ювенна опережает его вопрос:{/n} "Отец, это {name}. Он{mf||а} здесь по {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}моему приглашению{/d}".
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Спикер: Ювенна
Не играет DL_MetSeberianInThisLoop
Играет DL_TraitorsConspiracy
Не играет маска Гапрака

traits.locale_text: {n}Взгляд Себериана задерживается на вас, но Ювенна опережает его вопрос:{/n} "Отец, это {name}. Он{mf||а} уже успел{mf||а} поразить меня редким умом. На совете это будет нам полезно. Я ручаюсь".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安的目光停留在你身上，但尤文娜抢先回应了他的疑问：{/n}“父亲，这位{mf|He|She}是应{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}我邀请{/d}而来的{name}。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安的目光停留在你身上，但尤文娜抢先回应了他的疑问：{/n}“父亲，这位{mf|He|She}是应{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}我邀请{/d}而来的{name}。”

languages.text: {n}Le regard de Seberian s'attarde sur vous, mais Juvenna anticipe sa question :{/n} « Père, je vous présente {name}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}Mon {mf|invité|invitée}{/d}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard de Seberian s'attarde sur vous, mais Juvenna anticipe sa question :{/n} « Père, je vous présente {name}. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}Mon {mf|invité|invitée}{/d}. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian se detiene al verte, pero Juvenna se adelanta a su pregunta:{/n} «Padre, le presento a {name}. Está aquí por {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}invitación mía{/d}».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se detiene al verte, pero Juvenna se adelanta a su pregunta:{/n} «Padre, le presento a {name}. Está aquí por {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}invitación mía{/d}».

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın gözleri senden ayrılmazken Juvenna, aklında dolanan soruyu tahmin ediyor.{/n} "Baba, bu {name}. Buraya {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}davetlim{/d} olarak geldi."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın gözleri senden ayrılmazken Juvenna, aklında dolanan soruyu tahmin ediyor.{/n} "Baba, bu {name}. Buraya {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}davetlim{/d} olarak geldi."

languages.text: {n}Seberians Augen ruhen auf dir, aber Juvenna ahnt seine Frage bereits:{/n} "Vater, das ist {name}. {mf|Er|Sie} ist auf {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}meine Einladung{/d} hier."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの視線はあなたに留まるが、ジュベナが彼の質問を先読みする:{/n}「父、これは{name}です。{mf|彼|彼女}は{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}私の招待で{/d}ここに来たのです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's eyes linger on you, but Juvenna anticipates his question:{/n} "Father, this is {name}. {mf|He|She} is here at {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_JuvennaSide}my invitation{/d}."
